files.purpose: Shared memory multi-extent table engine with doubly-linked-list rows
Process lifecycle (InitSonProcess/ExitSonProcess), utilities, Hebrew encoding, date arithmetic
Unix-domain socket IPC, TCP sockets, message framing protocol
Error handling and logging with doom-loop protection
System V semaphore operations with re-entrant locking
C++ personality stub and Prn() debug helper
Build libgenlib.a static archive from 6 source files

concurrency_model.description: Single system semaphore protects ALL shared memory access. Re-entrant via sem_busy_flg counter.

ipc_architecture.description: AF_UNIX/SOCK_STREAM sockets called 'named pipes'. MESSAGE_HEADER framing with ASCII type+length fields. FILE_MESG for large data (via temp files), DATA_MESG for inline data.

shared_memory_engine.description: Multi-extent System V shm with MASTER_SHM_HEADER, EXTENT_HEADER chains, TABLE_HEADER doubly-linked list of named tables, TABLE_ROW doubly-linked rows with free chain for reuse.

process_bootstrap.description: InitSonProcess is the 13-step child process bootstrap called by all server components.

error_macro_system.description: RETURN_ON_ERR, ABORT_ON_ERR, CONT_ON_ERR macros with GerrId (source,line) and GerrStr (errno,strerror) expansion.

doom_loop_protection.description: GerrLogReturn and GerrLogToFileName include 250ms usleep() after logging to prevent rapid-fire error disk filling.

verification_backlog.notes: Referenced by Makefile:L4,L27 but not present in repository. Needed to verify CC, COMP_OPTS, AR values.
Referenced at Memory.c:L462. Global array of EnvTab structs defined elsewhere (likely Global.h or component source). Determines required environment variables.
Referenced at Memory.c:L575 and SharedMemory.cpp:L4007. ParamTab array defining per-component shm parameters. Defined per-component.
Defined in Global.h. messageType and messageLen are ASCII string fields parsed with atoi(). Exact field sizes determine wire protocol.
Used in BroadcastSonProcs at Memory.c:L797-L798. Determines broadcast-able shutdown/control messages.
SetInterProcMesg creates temp files in NamedpDir (Sockets.c:L1650-L1670). No cleanup mechanism observed in GenLib.
All static variables (ConnTab, ExtentChain, sem_busy_flg) are not thread-safe. System appears purely multi-process.
GetProc at SharedMemory.cpp:L2829 searches by pid. Confirm whether it uses ActItems internally or direct iteration.

factors: Complex shared memory table engine with extent chaining and doubly-linked rows
Three IPC mechanisms: shared memory, semaphores, Unix-domain sockets
Tightly coupled concurrency model (single semaphore for all shm access)
Mixed C/C++ compilation (SharedMemory.cpp is the only C++ file)
Hebrew encoding with byte-level manipulation and RTL text handling
Foundation library linked by every component - changes have system-wide impact

security_notes.description: Hard-coded semaphore key SemKey1 = 0x000abcde (same value as ShmKey1)
File mode 0777 for semaphore and shared memory - any user on system can access
setuid() call using MacUid from environment - drops to unprivileged user
